abilities.description: Exile the top card of your library face down.
Sacrifice CARDNAME. If you do, discard your hand, then put all cards exiled with CARDNAME into their owner's hand.

effect.description: Sacrifice CARDNAME. If you do, discard your hand, then put all cards exiled with CARDNAME into their owner's hand.
effect.name: SacrificeAll

triggers.description: When CARDNAME leaves the battlefield, put all cards exiled with CARDNAME into their owner's graveyard.
